title: Surgery Department at UHDC Dehradun
description: The Surgery Department at UHDC Dehradun offers comprehensive surgical care with a team of skilled surgeons and state-of-the-art facilities. We provide a wide range of surgical services, including general surgery, laparoscopic procedures, and specialized surgeries. Our commitment to patient safety, advanced techniques, and compassionate care ensures the best outcomes for our patients. Whether it's elective surgery or emergency procedures, our department is dedicated to delivering high-quality surgical care with a focus on patient well-being and recovery.

content.overview: The General Surgery Department at Uttaranchal Hospital & Diagnostic Centre (UHDC), Dehradun provides comprehensive allopathic surgical care for a wide range of medical and surgical conditions. Our experienced surgical team manages general surgical cases, trauma, emergency conditions, and both major and minor surgical procedures with a strong focus on patient safety and successful outcomes.The department is equipped with modern and well-established Operation Theatres (OT), supported by advanced diagnostic services, ICU facilities, and post-operative care units. We manage conditions such as hernia, appendicitis, gallbladder diseases, piles, fistula, breast disorders, soft tissue swellings, and other surgical conditions.At UHDC, we emphasize timely intervention, evidence-based surgical practices, faster recovery, and patient-centered care to ensure the best possible treatment experience.

faq.question: What kinds of surgical care are offered?
faq.answer: The General Surgery Department at UHDC offers a wide range of surgical care, including both major and minor procedures. It covers general surgeries such as hernia repair, appendicitis, gallbladder removal, piles, fistula, and treatment of soft tissue swellings and breast disorders. The department also manages emergency and trauma cases requiring immediate surgical intervention. With well-equipped operation theatres, ICU support, and post-operative care facilities, the focus is on safe surgery, timely treatment, faster recovery, and patient-centered care using evidence-based surgical practices.

faq.question: Will I get guidance before surgery?
faq.answer: Yes. Patients are guided through assessment, preparation, and the steps needed before any procedure is scheduled.

faq.question: Can the department help with follow-up after surgery?
faq.answer: Yes. Follow-up care is part of the recovery process and helps monitor healing, comfort, and next steps.
